productDisplayName: Nike Men Laced Crew Black T-Shirts
description: Composition Black crew neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has an interior taping for comfortable Fit and short sleeves Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean With an artistic take on nike's world-famous footwear legacy, the nike "Laced" men's T-Shirt provides lasting comfort and unique graphic appeal. With a standard fit and a crew neck, this is probably the most comfortable tee in town.
